validation.message: No contract total amount was extracted.

blocks.text: Project Name
Project XX
Project Location
Tainan City
Smart Energy Management System
Design principles and scope of content:

It can integrate various smart IoT sensing devices such as smart meters, smart distribution panels, and environmental sensors to collect information on on-site loads and circuit energy consumption, including but not limited to building-wide electricity consumption, solar power, electric vehicle power consumption, etc. The system is not limited to the new headquarters building; through an Open API interface, it supports integration into the energy management of other plants, generating corresponding reports. It also provides smart power dispatching and management services and visual decision analysis tools.
Energy management
Record the energy consumption management (water and electricity consumption) of the entire building, integrate solar power generation management, and realize the visualization of energy use .
All energy consumption data must be updated in real time to ensure accuracy and timeliness.
It supports historical data queries, facilitating long-term energy consumption analysis and management.
Energy consumption data should support export in multiple formats to facilitate data analysis and report generation.
Set up an abnormal energy consumption alarm to automatically notify management personnel when energy consumption exceeds a preset value.
It supports regional energy consumption statistics, which facilitates accurate management and allocation of energy resources.
Energy consumption analysis
The system should have energy consumption analysis capabilities, provide energy-saving suggestions , and improve energy efficiency.
Energy consumption analysis needs to cover all aspects, including electricity, lighting, air conditioning, public facilities, and water usage.
Energy consumption analysis reports should have chart display functions to facilitate intuitive viewing of energy consumption trends.
It provides simulation and prediction functions for energy-saving measures to help develop energy-saving strategies.
The system should have an energy-saving effect assessment function to analyze the actual effect of energy-saving measures after implementation.
Central monitoring platform
Integrate the builder's central control system (BA) to manage and monitor all energy equipment in a unified manner.
The platform needs to have the ability to display actual data so that managers can check energy usage at any time.
It supports multiple users accessing computers, mobile phones, etc., and different users can be set with different access permissions.
Set up automatic alarm and notification functions so that when the system detects abnormal energy consumption or equipment failure, it can promptly notify relevant personnel.
The platform must have data backup and recovery functions to prevent data loss.
It provides a function to generate regular reports, including weekly, monthly, and annual reports, to help management understand energy usage and trends.
Interface Operation and Usage Guidelines
The interface should be simple and clear, avoiding redundant information and highlighting key data and operations.
Provide a clear navigation structure to ensure users can quickly find the functions and information they need.
All interface elements should maintain a consistent design style and operating logic to avoid user confusion.
The interface should have a fast response time to avoid excessively long waiting times for users.
Smart Office

Design Principles and Scope: The smart office serves as the gateway to all smart applications within the new headquarters. Employees can access the [ Resource Reservation System] and [Repair Request and Dispatch System ] through this Line App website. Furthermore, it integrates with the login accounts of employees from Great Wall Motors for resource access control.
When employees log into the smart office system, the system automatically links to their Line account, HR system employee ID, and Dacheng employee portal account.
The smart office system includes the following systems
Resource reservation system (including meeting rooms, official vehicles, and lounges)
Service Repair and Dispatch System
System development specifications. The following specifications refer to the system described above as a custom-built system for this project, not an existing product.
We need to provide the source code so that Dacheng Information can undertake subsequent maintenance projects.
The development system is primarily based on NetCode C# programming.
The application needs to run on Linux Ubuntu.
The associated database must be based on Postgres SQL.
Smart office system services all need to support RESTful API interfaces.
Smart office systems all need to integrate Windows Active Directory authentication.
Resource reservation system (including meeting rooms, official vehicles, book lending, projector lending, and other resources).
Design principles and scope: A management system for office information reservation, rental, and borrowing . Resources are not limited by location.
The resource reservation system provides a management backend interface, which can be accessed and operated through a Web GUI.
The resource reservation system's web GUI management backend supports SSL/TLS security mechanisms for access protection.
The resource reservation system must integrate AD account permission management.
The backend management system supports character grouping.
The resource management system provides a RESTful API , which allows for resource reservation functionality.
The resource reservation system allows users to add and reserve resources in the backend, including meeting rooms, official vehicles, karaoke, etc.
Built-in RBS software allows for integration with mainstream calendar systems such as Microsoft Office 365, Google Workspace, and Microsoft Exchange servers.
A tablet is required at the entrance of the conference room. The tablet should be a 10.1-inch capacitive touch panel that can display the current meeting being held in the conference room.
The conference room tablet supports Power over Ethernet (PoE), which can transmit power and information over a single Ethernet cable.
There is a QR code at the entrance of the meeting room ; you can rent the system directly by scanning the QR code .
The conference room system can generate records of bookings made by users but not used.
The official vehicle reservation system allows employees to reserve official vehicles through the website and fill in the necessary fields.
When official vehicles are returned after use, users can report the mileage directly through the app by taking a photo or entering the information.
The reservation system is developed with a web GUI architecture and also provides a Line App.
The resource reservation system supports OpenAPI , allowing external access points (APs) to reserve and cancel resources via API.
Supports multiple browsers: Windows IE10 and above, Google Chrome, Apple Safari, Firefox, Opera and other mainstream browsers.

Based on the HTML5 standard, browsers do not need to install any additional programs or packages, and it does not need to be executed through programs such as Java or Flash. It can be opened and viewed directly on smartphones and tablets.
Upon completion, the manufacturer must provide the following documents.
User manual.
Specifications and technical documents.
As-built drawings related to the project, such as wiring diagrams, installation diagrams, floor plans, and wiring configuration diagrams.
Repair and dispatch system

Design principles and scope: Manage the repair work of company equipment . Employees can use the system to take photos and file repair reports when they discover damage to various office assets. Manage the maintenance status of assets.
The reporting system provides a web GUI management backend and supports SSL/TLS security mechanisms for access protection.
The work reporting system needs to integrate AD verification.
The work reporting system has an access control design that allows for setting and grouping permissions.
The system can create fields. For example, Yongkang General Company and Machouhou Food Factory.
Employees can report damaged items via the Line App.
The dispatch system allows users to upload photos.
The responsible units can check work orders through the website.
Each work order generates a work order number, which can be used to verify the allocation of costs from the electronic signature system and SAP costs.
The work reporting system needs to be able to manage the lifecycle of objects for repair and maintenance.
The maintenance reporting system can remind the custodian of the property that items need routine maintenance.
The maintenance reporting system provides a maintenance management interface, allowing the custodian to upload maintenance documents.
The reporting system provides an API, which allows users to access data.
The system has a GUI reporting backend, which can analyze the maintenance status of various items.
The report backend has a function to export to Excel files.
The system can assign a maintenance person to the project based on the work order.
Supports multiple browsers: Windows IE10 and above, Google Chrome, Apple Safari, Firefox, Opera and other mainstream browsers.

Based on the HTML5 standard, browsers do not need to install any additional programs or packages, and it does not need to be executed through programs such as Java or Flash. It can be opened and viewed directly on smartphones and tablets.
Software warranty specifications
After the delivered application system has been accepted and approved, the vendor must provide operational guidance and training. The training duration will be agreed upon by both parties.
The software warranty begins upon delivery and acceptance of the software. The software warranty period is one year.
System malfunction fix (bug fix)

After the system goes live, it must cooperate with our agency's webpage vulnerability scanning, penetration testing, or other cybersecurity tools to detect and patch vulnerabilities , thereby assisting our agency in strengthening program security.

Hardware Warranty and Maintenance Responsibility: This contract stipulates full responsibility for maintenance and repair. Any malfunctions or defects discovered during the warranty period shall be rectified free of charge and unconditionally by the manufacturer within a reasonable period specified by the agency. Failure to rectify within the specified period will result in the agency taking action, with the manufacturer bearing all costs, or the agency using the warranty deposit for further action, seeking reimbursement from the manufacturer if insufficient. However, for defects caused by intentional damage, improper use, normal wear and tear of parts and accessories, or other reasons not attributable to the manufacturer, the agency will bear the rectification costs.
Software maintenance and training
Chinese operation and maintenance manual
Manufacturer's Operation and Maintenance Manual
Complete instructions for each product, its operating procedures, and maintenance.

To ensure the security and integrity of the information and communication system in this case, if any issues such as SQL Injection, Cross Site Scripting (XSS), or other issues listed in the top ten cybersecurity vulnerabilities published by OWASP over the years (including those discovered during testing by the agency or outsourced testing, reported by the National Information and Communication Security Technical Service Center, and other reporting channels) occur during the contract period, the vendor should consult with the agency, cooperate with the schedule to make corrections, and submit a correction report. The correction costs should be included in the contract price .

Manufacturers should provide complete system architecture specifications, system analysis and design, database field design and other usage forms as required, and program development can only proceed after confirmation by relevant personnel of the relevant authorities.
Manufacturers should ensure the consistency of program and document versions.

For systems or resources not developed by the manufacturer, the manufacturer should indicate that the content was not developed by the manufacturer and its source, and provide authorization certificates.

The various hardware and software devices provided by the vendor in this project should be able to achieve the goals of patching or exploiting vulnerabilities during the contract period and within the network architecture of the organization, effectively preventing the harm caused by vulnerabilities and weaknesses.

Before conducting business, vendors should understand and comply with the agency's "Information Security Policy" and related information and communication security regulations through the agency's website, the contract between the two parties, or other written documents, and should sign a "Vendor Confidentiality Agreement". All personnel providing services should sign a "Confidentiality Consent Form".

When a vendor's service personnel signs a "Confidentiality Consent Form," the signatory should read the "Personal Data Collection Notice" on the back of the "Confidentiality Consent Form" and sign at the end of that page to confirm that the signatory understands the management of the personal data they sign.
Appendix (II) Security Terms for Foreign-Invested Telecommunications Equipment - Procurement of Telecommunications Hardware

Manufacturers should provide relevant supporting evidence to prove the delivered equipment. If the country of origin is China, they must provide an inspection report from a third-party impartial organization to prove that the main components do not have improper information collection or transmission functions.

IoT devices that connect to the network wirelessly should use wireless access points with encryption protocols to connect to the network and bind devices using mechanisms such as network card number whitelists.
IoT devices should have an identity verification mechanism, should have an initial password change mechanism, and should have a security update mechanism.
